creator: c0rn@o2.pl
text:
update claws-mail & plugins to bugfix release 3.7.8

CCing: netchild@ and miwi@

netchild:

--disable-manual should work again, I wasn't sure do you want to
bring back WITH_MANUAL knob?, so I left it untouched

miwi:

removed LIB_DEPENDS from claws-mail-tnef because it's not needed
for some time now, from plugin's Changelog:

2008-04-29 [colin]      0.2.3cvs2

        * configure.ac
        * src/Makefile.am
        * src/mapi.h
        * src/mapidefs.h
        * src/mapitags.h
        * src/tnef-errors.h
        * src/tnef-types.h
        * src/ytnef.c
        * src/ytnef.h
                Use an internal libytnef, as the upstream
                one isn't maintained anymore
